violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils both ice machines were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machines were placed out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use either ice machine until they are properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The corners in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue food debris, and old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Units to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
The plumbing to the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Leak observed from the bottom left pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
The hoods in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
The wall junctures in the door way do not have coving. The wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
Observed ceiling tiles to be peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
